mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.AUDIT_NO, A.VD_CD, A.VD_NM, A.AUDIT_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS AUDIT_TYP_NM, TO_CHAR(A.AUDIT_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AUDIT_YMD, A.RESULT_GRADE, G.CD_NM_KO AS RESULT_GRADE_NM, A.FINDING_CNT, A.ACTION_REQ_YN, A.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REG_ID FROM VD_AUDIT A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='AUDIT_STS' AND C.CD=A.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='AUDIT_TYP' AND T.CD=A.AUDIT_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE G ON G.GRP_CD='AUDIT_GRADE' AND G.CD=A.RESULT_GRADE AND G.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DEL_YN='N'
AND (A.AUDIT_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR A.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND A.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY A.ID DESC

SELECT A.ID, A.COMP_CD, A.AUDIT_NO, A.VD_CD, A.VD_NM, A.AUDIT_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS AUDIT_TYP_NM, TO_CHAR(A.AUDIT_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS AUDIT_YMD, A.AUDITOR_ID, A.RESULT_GRADE, G.CD_NM_KO AS RESULT_GRADE_NM, A.FINDING_CNT, A.ACTION_REQ_YN, A.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REMARK, A.REG_ID FROM VD_AUDIT A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='AUDIT_STS' AND C.CD=A.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='AUDIT_TYP' AND T.CD=A.AUDIT_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE G ON G.GRP_CD='AUDIT_GRADE' AND G.CD=A.RESULT_GRADE AND G.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.ID=#{id} AND A.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, AUDIT_ID, ITEM_SEQ, AUDIT_ITEM_NM, RESULT, FINDING, ACTION_REQ FROM VD_AUDIT_RESULT WHERE AUDIT_ID=#{auditId} ORDER BY ITEM_SEQ
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_AUDIT (COMP_CD, AUDIT_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, AUDIT_TYP, AUDIT_YMD, AUDITOR_ID, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{auditNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, NVL(#{auditTyp},'REGULAR'), TO_DATE(#{auditYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{auditorId}, 'ING', #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE VD_AUDIT SET RESULT_GRADE=#{resultGrade}, FINDING_CNT=#{findingCnt}, ACTION_REQ_YN=#{actionReqYn}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_AUDIT SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_VENDOR SET RISK_GRADE=#{riskGrade}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND DEL_YN='N'
UPDATE VD_AUDIT SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_AUDIT_RESULT (AUDIT_ID, ITEM_SEQ, AUDIT_ITEM_NM, RESULT, FINDING, ACTION_REQ, REG_ID) VALUES (#{auditId}, #{itemSeq}, #{auditItemNm}, NVL(#{result},'SAFE'), #{finding}, #{actionReq}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT R.ID, R.REGAL_NO, R.REGAL_NM, R.REGAL_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS REGAL_TYP_NM, TO_CHAR(R.PLAN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PLAN_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.NOTIFY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NOTIFY_YMD, TO_CHAR(R.ENFORCE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ENFORCE_YMD, TRUNC(R.ENFORCE_YMD) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS DAYS_TO_ENFORCE, R.ALARM_YN, R.ALARM_BEFORE_DAY, R.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM FROM VD_REGAL R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='REGAL_TYP' AND T.CD=R.REGAL_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='REGAL_STS' AND S.CD=R.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N' AND R.REGAL_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' AND R.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY R.ENFORCE_YMD NULLS LAST, R.ID DESC

SELECT ID, REGAL_NO, REGAL_NM, REGAL_TYP, TO_CHAR(PLAN_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PLAN_YMD, TO_CHAR(NOTIFY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS NOTIFY_YMD, TO_CHAR(ENFORCE_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ENFORCE_YMD, TARGET_DESC, ALARM_YN, ALARM_BEFORE_DAY, STS, REMARK, USE_YN FROM VD_REGAL WHERE ID=#{id} AND DEL_YN='N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VD_REGAL WHERE REGAL_NO=#{regalNo} AND DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO VD_REGAL (REGAL_NO, REGAL_NM, REGAL_TYP, PLAN_YMD, NOTIFY_YMD, ENFORCE_YMD, TARGET_DESC, ALARM_YN, ALARM_BEFORE_DAY, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{regalNo}, #{regalNm}, NVL(#{regalTyp},'LAW'), TO_DATE(#{planYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{notifyYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{enforceYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{targetDesc}, NVL(#{alarmYn},'N'), NVL(#{alarmBeforeDay},30), NVL(#{sts},'ACTIVE'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE VD_REGAL SET REGAL_NM=#{regalNm}, REGAL_TYP=#{regalTyp}, PLAN_YMD=TO_DATE(#{planYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NOTIFY_YMD=TO_DATE(#{notifyYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), ENFORCE_YMD=TO_DATE(#{enforceYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TARGET_DESC=#{targetDesc}, ALARM_YN=#{alarmYn}, ALARM_BEFORE_DAY=#{alarmBeforeDay}, STS=#{sts}, REMARK=#{remark}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE VD_REGAL SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
